channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: JSEval - Wed May 27 14:13:43 UTC 2026
item.description:
JSEval lets you inspect the evaluation results of your JavaScript and TypeScript code directly at the position they appear in the editor - no console switching needed...

item.title: Claude Code Native - Wed May 27 08:36:53 UTC 2026
